      Methods in com.google.cloud.pubsublite.v1 that return PublisherServiceClient 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static PublisherServiceClient PublisherServiceClient.create()
      Constructs an instance of PublisherServiceClient with default settings.
      static PublisherServiceClient PublisherServiceClient.create(PublisherServiceSettings settings)
      Constructs an instance of PublisherServiceClient, using the given settings.
      static PublisherServiceClient PublisherServiceClient.create(PublisherServiceStub stub)
      Constructs an instance of PublisherServiceClient, using the given stub for making calls.
